summary: Plan-only classification for five open PRs. No merge action is recommended because the artifact does not include complete merge preflight proof, especially Codex /review. #86913 has concrete failing CI and should be repaired on the contributor branch. #88908 is broad/high-risk enough to require maintainer judgment before any merge path.

repair_candidate.pr_body:
Repair path for #86913. This keeps the existing contributor branch as the source of truth, preserves attribution for @Dizesales/dizevolv425, and focuses only on getting the restart pending state changes through failing CI and Codex review.

Validation:
- pnpm -s vitest run extensions/admin-http-rpc/src/handler.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/restart.test.ts src/infra/infra-runtime.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed
